<template>
  <nav-bar-component />
  <main class="main-content">
    <router-view />
  </main>
</template>

<script>
import NavBarComponent from "./components/NavBarComponent.vue";

export default {
  name: "App",
  components: {
    "nav-bar-component": NavBarComponent
  }
};
</script>

<style>
body {
  margin: 0;
  padding: 0;
  font-family: sans-serif;
  background-color: #fcfbfa;
}

.main-content {
  padding-top: 110px; 
  min-height: calc(100vh - 110px);
}
</style>
